meaning: adj.非尘世的,神秘的,怪异的,理想的
examples: She heard the sirens scream their unearthly wail.
The sound was so serene that it seemed unearthly.
For a few seconds we watched the unearthly lights on the water.
The unearthly howl rose to a scream as Carmack throttled it up to its 2, 200 pounds of thrust.
Youd be paying an unearthly 64 times revenues, and those revenues may be a little spongier than Wall Street realizes.
